notes: This skill edits live de.wikisource pages and requires the single Playwright browser session for elexikon.ch (Cloudflare). Evals therefore run the OFFLINE portion (assembly + scan proofread) on pre-fetched inputs; no baseline runs (a no-skill agent cannot reach elexikon and must not edit the live wiki).

evals.prompt: Fill the unvollständig RE article RE:Tubantes (BAND VII A,1, columns 752-754) with the eLexikon OCR text: proofread it word-by-word against the column scans and produce the complete new page wikitext. Inputs are pre-fetched local files (skeleton, eLexikon text, column PNGs). Do not edit any wiki and do not use a browser.
evals.expected_output: A complete wikitext file where the [...] placeholder is replaced by the proofread OCR body, both skeleton {{Seite}} lines (incl. the {{REIA}} one) survive byte-identically at the column breaks, KORREKTURSTAND is unkorrigiert, REAutor/categories untouched, margin line-numbers (10/20/.../60) removed, hyphen-split words rejoined, Greek verified against the scan; plus a notes JSON listing fixes and uncertainties.

evals.prompt: Fill the unvollständig RE article RE:Herennius 12 (BAND VIII,1, single column 664, SPALTE_END=OFF) with the eLexikon OCR text: proofread it word-by-word against the column scan and produce the complete new page wikitext. Inputs are pre-fetched local files. Do not edit any wiki and do not use a browser.
evals.expected_output: A complete wikitext file: no {{Seite}} lines (single column), [...] replaced by the short proofread body starting with the bold headword as printed, KORREKTURSTAND unkorrigiert, REAutor/categories untouched; plus a notes JSON.
assertions: footnotes kept and Anmerkungen block placed after {{REAutor}}
